title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Common questions about GhostLy, the AI assistant that reads your screen.

faqs.question: How does GhostLy read my screen?
faqs.answer: When you send a question, GhostLy captures what's on your active window at that moment, right on your Mac. Whether you're coding, reading a document, or reviewing a design, it uses that snapshot as context. No copying text, no attaching screenshots.

faqs.question: Why do I need GhostLy?
faqs.answer: Most AI tools live in a browser tab. You copy text, switch apps, and lose your place. GhostLy sits on top of your work and answers based on what's actually in front of you.

faqs.question: Is my screen data private?
faqs.answer: Yes. GhostLy processes what it reads on your Mac before anything is sent to AI. Screen data is not stored on our servers. When you ask a question, your prompt goes directly to the AI provider you choose (Claude, OpenAI, or Gemini) over encrypted connections.

faqs.question: Does GhostLy hide personal information?
faqs.answer: Yes. Secure Processing is on by default, and you can turn it off in Settings. This beta feature redacts sensitive details on your Mac before anything is sent to AI. That includes personal info like emails, phone numbers, and payment details, plus common patterns like API keys and secrets in environment files. It's not perfect yet, so always double-check what you're sharing.

faqs.question: Which AI providers does GhostLy support?
faqs.answer: GhostLy works with Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, and Google Gemini. Connect your own accounts and pay the provider directly for usage.

faqs.question: What does GhostLy use as context?
faqs.answer: GhostLy reads your active screen and clipboard. When you're working with lots of text, it pulls the words. When you're looking at a design or UI, it captures what you see. Turn screen reading off in Settings anytime you just want a simple chat.

faqs.question: Can I customize the shortcuts?
faqs.answer: Yes. Change the shortcut to open GhostLy (default ⌘+G) and set up other shortcuts in Settings.

faqs.question: Is GhostLy available for commercial use?
faqs.answer: Yes. GhostLy is a one time $20 purchase for lifetime use, with no monthly fee from us. Each license covers a limited number of devices, shown at checkout and in your Lemon Squeezy receipt.

faqs.question: How does GhostLy help me spend less on AI?
faqs.answer: Copying and pasting often sends more context than you need. GhostLy can trim and structure screen context before it reaches your provider, especially in text mode with token optimization turned on. Visual mode may still send a screen capture when that's the best way to answer your question. What you spend depends on your settings and the task.

faqs.question: Is GhostLy only available for Mac?
faqs.answer: For now, yes. GhostLy is built for macOS. Windows is in development. Join the waitlist on our homepage and we'll email you when it's ready. Linux is on the roadmap, but we don't have a date to share yet.

faqs.question: What support comes with my purchase?
faqs.answer: We release bug fixes and improvements regularly. New features show up in minor updates, like v1.1.0.

faqs.question: How can I report a bug or suggest a feature?
faqs.answer: We'd love to hear from you. Report bugs or suggest features in our community repository.
